# BEAudioSession

**Class**

An object that represents an audio session.

## Declaration

```swift
@objc(BEAudioSession) class BEAudioSession
```

## Initializers

- **init(audioSession:)**: Creates a BE audio session from an  AV audio session

## Instance Properties

- **availableOutputs**: Gets the set of output ports that are available for routing.
- **preferredOutput**: Get the preferred output port.  Will be nil if no preference has been set.

## Instance Methods

- **setPreferredOutput(_:)**

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
